notable_findings: EB1007 draw-only youth any bull matches the truth table at 750 for both 2025 and 2026.
EB1012 Uinta Basin private lands only any bull is 500 in current repo-side 2026 source rows but 750 in the user-provided truth table (+250).
The repo does not currently represent the 15000 spike-bull and 15000 any-bull category totals as clean category-level numeric rows.
The repo also does not currently provide a clean category-level numeric row for Any Bull Late Unlimited, and EB1011 youth general season is context-only with no numeric quota published.
